{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lycus' mother
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus' mother]] has honey-colored hair and pale green eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
